title: Die Geierwally
writer: Ewald André Dupont, Wilhelmine von Hillern
actors: Albert Steinrück, Henny Porten, William Dieterle
plot: "The Bear Joseph", so named because of a fight with a bear, is rescued by Wally, a farmer's daughter, from a dangerous situation in a vulture's nest. He then calls her "Geierwally". They fall in love.
